data.title: Add model.* config keys and create resolve-model-id.sh
data.description:
1. Add model.haiku=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, model.sonnet=claude-sonnet-4-6-20260320, model.opus=claude-opus-4-6 to .claude/dso-config.conf with comment block
2. Create plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh: takes tier (haiku/sonnet/opus) as arg, calls read-config.sh for model.$tier, validates non-empty (exits 1 with descriptive error if empty), outputs model ID to stdout
3. Remove RED marker from .test-index
4. Migration note: add model.* key documentation to plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md

TDD: Task 1 RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config keys exist in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'model.haiku=' .claude/dso-config.conf && grep -q 'model.sonnet=' .claude/dso-config.conf && grep -q 'model.opus=' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] resolve-model-id.sh exists and executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh
- [ ] Returns correct model ID per tier
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh haiku | grep -q 'claude-haiku' && bash plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh sonnet | grep -q 'claude-sonnet' && bash plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh opus | grep -q 'claude-opus'
- [ ] Exits non-zero for missing key
  Verify: WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE=/dev/null bash plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh haiku; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Migration note in INSTALL.md
  Verify: grep -q 'model.haiku' plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
